Description: Verify Home Page Hero Section
Step 1: Open browser and navigate to the application home page (http://localhost:5173)
Step 2: Observe the hero section at the top of the page
Step 3: Confirm the hero title text is displayed
Step 4: Confirm a call-to-action button is present
Expected Results: Hero section displays "Business Credit Cards" title; descriptive text containing "Earn rewards" is shown; a "Compare" button is visible and clickable

Description: Navigate to Comparison Page from Hero CTA
Step 1: Open browser and navigate to the home page
Step 2: Click the ""Compare"" button in the hero section
Step 3: Wait for the page to load
Expected Results: Browser navigates to /cards URL; page displays "Compare Business Credit Cards" heading with all 5 credit card products listed

Step 3: Click the first ""View Details"" button

Expected Results: Browser navigates to /cards/{id} URL; card details page loads showing the card name as a heading; annual fee and rewards rate are displayed
